title: Blowup in number of cells when swapping an assign and an always block

features.name: ternary assign referencing register in always block
features.description: Code should include an assign statement using a ternary operator where the condition selects between a register variable and a constant, where that register is defined in a separate always @(posedge clk) block

features.name: always block with nonblocking assignment containing concatenation
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block with non-blocking assignment containing a complex expression that uses concatenation operator to combine two signals

features.name: bit slice in ternary condition
features.description: Code should include a bit slice operation used as the condition in a ternary expression, where the slice extracts a subset of bits from a multi-bit wire

features.name: nested ternary in complex expression
features.description: Code should include nested ternary operators used within a larger expression, combining multiple conditional selections with bitwise operations
